title: If / Else Statements
description: Make decisions in your code with conditionals

blocks.content: Conditionals let your code make decisions. Use `if` and `else` statements to run different code depending on whether a condition is true or false.
An `if` statement runs code only when a condition is true.
Use `else` to run different code when the condition is false.
Use `else if` to check multiple conditions.
You can put `if` statements inside other `if` statements for more complex logic.
A quick way to write simple if/else in one line. Syntax: `condition ? valueIfTrue : valueIfFalse`
Use the ternary operator for simple choices. For more complex decisions, use if/else for clarity.
